page_metadata.biotools__summary: BigDataProcessor2 (BDP2) is a Fiji plugin for interactive processing of TB-sized image data. BDP2 uses BigDataViewer for rendering and the ImgLib2 library for image processing.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BigDataProcessor2 (BDP2) is a Fiji plugin for interactive processing of TB-sized image data. BDP2 uses BigDataViewer for rendering and the ImgLib2 library for image processing.
